description: As a remote sensing scientist preparing a comprehensive land surface characterization report for an agricultural ministry, analyze the Landsat multispectral imagery at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1: SWIR1, band_2: NIR, band_3: Red, band_4: Green) in SNAP Desktop. Derive four spectral indices characterizing vegetation vigor, water presence, soil exposure, and soil-adjusted vegetation. Create a classified land cover map with at least three thematic classes based on the spectral index values. Save the analysis product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/land_surface_analysis.dim and export as GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/land_surface_analysis.tif.
